findings.title: Centralized Minting Authority
findings.description: The contract has a mint function restricted by access control (e.g. onlyMinter, require(msg.sender == minter)). While not exploitable by the public, a compromised owner/minter can inflate supply.
findings.impact: A compromised or malicious owner could mint additional tokens, diluting existing holders.
findings.recommendation: Consider implementing a supply cap, timelocks, or multi-sig requirements for minting operations.

findings.title: OC-000 · Risk Score: 45/100
findings.description: BNB Attestation (BAS) on BSC. Risk Score: 45/100. MEDIUM RISK - Some concerns identified. Proceed with caution.
findings.impact:
RUG PULL ASSESSMENT:

Direct Rug Indicators:
- Honeypot: Unlikely
- LP Lock: NO or UNKNOWN (risk)
- Ownership: Active (risk)

Probability: LOWER (<30%)

The main risk is NOT technical but ECONOMIC - concentrated supply with low liquidity.
findings.recommendation:
FINAL RECOMMENDATION:

Risk Score: 45/100

PROCEED WITH EXTREME CAUTION:
- Moderate risks identified
- Only invest what you can afford to lose
